storyTitleFirm: What is happening with your client?
storyDescription: Describe the situation in your own words — dates, people, documents, and what worries you. We'll figure out the legal category for you.
storyPlaceholderFirm: e.g. Client received an eviction notice after reporting mold. Lease ends in 3 months. Landlord claims non-payment but client has bank transfers.
storyPlaceholderPersonal: e.g. My landlord hasn't returned my deposit after I moved out two months ago. I have photos, the lease, and WhatsApp messages.
generatingOutcomeOptions: Generating options based on your situation…
outcomeMoreContextPlaceholder: Add more context or specify other desired outcomes…
outcomeResolutionPlaceholder: Describe what a successful resolution looks like…
documentsHelpAnalysis: Leases, notices, contracts, screenshots, or photos can significantly improve your analysis.
accountRequiredForFiles: A free account is required to attach files.
dragOrBrowse: Drag files here or click to browse
previewWithoutDocuments: You can still get a preview without documents. Attach them anytime after creating an account.

ctaFullTitle: Keep this case in your Umbrella workspace

signUpForFullAnalysis: Sign up free for the full analysis

lawyerReviewBenefit: Based on the complexity and risk in your situation, speaking with a licensed lawyer would be beneficial.
findLawyerInJurisdiction: Find a lawyer in your jurisdiction →
complexMatterFirmGuidance: This case has elevated complexity or risk. Consider involving specialist counsel or a senior team member.

changeIfElsewhere: Change if this matter applies elsewhere.
detectedCountryChange: We detected {country}. Change it if needed.
microFlowFactsPlaceholder: Describe your situation in as much detail as possible — the more context you provide, the better the analysis.
planningQuestionsError: Couldn't load clarifying questions — you can skip straight to analysis.
tier2CoverageNotice: We'll do our best — full legal database coverage is available for {countries}.
generatingTargetedQuestions: Generating targeted questions for your situation…
planningOptionalIntro: Answer a few targeted questions to sharpen the analysis (optional — you can skip).
errorBackendInterrupted: The analysis connection was interrupted before the preview finished. Ensure the backend is running on port 4000, then try again.
errorBackendInterruptedFirmIntake: The preview connection dropped before the page updated. Check Leads — your intake may already be saved. If not, ensure the backend is running on port 4000 and try again.
errorCouldNotReachServer: Could not reach the server. Check that the backend is running on port 4000 and try again.
errorCouldNotReachServerFirmIntake: Could not reach the server while saving intake. Check Leads in case it was saved, ensure the backend is running on port 4000, then try again.
errorPreviewFailed: Failed to generate preview. Please try again.
errorClassificationFailed: Could not analyze your situation. Fill in the details below and continue.
errorClassificationContinue: Could not analyze your situation. You can continue anyway.
intakeSavedToPipeline: has been saved to your leads pipeline and is ready for review.
firmIntakeSubtitle: Capture a client issue and route it to your firm workspace with AI support.
previewUsesCredit: This uses 1 AI credit for the full preview and saves your case.
previewFreeExcerpt: You'll get a free excerpt first. Create an account anytime to unlock the full analysis.
filesSelected: {count, plural, one {# file selected} other {# files selected}}
docsAnalyzed: {count, plural, one {# document analyzed} other {# documents analyzed}}
filesAttached: {count, plural, one {# file attached} other {# files attached}}
planning_all_captured: We captured the key details from your description. You can go straight to analysis.
